errors.too_many_requests: Too many requests, please try again later.
errors.too_many_login_attempts: Too many login attempts. Please try again in 15 minutes.

ERRORS.DUPLICATE_TOTEM_NAME: A totem with that name already exists
ERRORS.NO_VALID_FIELDS: No valid fields provided for update
ERRORS.VERSION_CONFLICT: Version conflict: data changed on the server, please refresh
ERRORS.SESSION_REQUIRED: A session is required to place orders
ERRORS.SESSION_INVALID: The session is no longer valid for this table
ERRORS.TABLE_SESSION_ENDED: The table no longer has an active session
ERRORS.TOTEM_SESSION_ACTIVE: Another session is already active on this table
ERRORS.SHIFT_CLOSED: Shift closed. All customer sessions have been terminated.
ERRORS.ORDER_CONCURRENCY: The order changed during the operation. Please refresh.
ERRORS.ITEM_CONCURRENCY: The item changed during the operation. Please sync again.
ERRORS.TICKET_CALCULATION_ERROR: Error while calculating the ticket amount.
ERRORS.ITEMS_WITHOUT_OWNER: There are items without an assigned guest. Please assign them before charging individually.
ERRORS.KITCHEN_CATEGORY_RESTRICTED: Kitchen role can only manage items in the 'Fuera de Carta' category
